title: [Arc] Use CallOp instead of latency 0 StateOp
body:
We currently have to ways to call an arc transfer function with no delay:
* `arc.state` with `lat 0`
* `arc.call`

This simplifies the `arc.state` operation by always requiring latency > 0 and uses `arc.call` operations instead of the latency 0 states.

I ran rocket small and boom large with this PR and dhrystone completed successfully.
